title: lindernia pedunculata
intro: Lindernia pedunculata, also known as False Lipenia or False Pimpernel, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Linderniaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Lindernia pedunculata include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
